title: Tender Filipino Fruit Halo Halo
description: A Filipino dessert featuring a mix of fruits, sweetened beans, and creamy milk, topped with a scoop of ice cream and crunchy toasted pinipig, with a hint of bitterness from the melon and a burst of juiciness from the fresh fruits.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the shaved ice, sweetened kidney beans, sweetened kaong, and jackfruit.
In a separate bowl, mix together the coconut milk, evaporated milk, and sugar until the sugar is fully dissolved.
Pour the milk mixture over the shaved ice mixture and stir until well combined.
Add the diced melon to the mixture and stir gently.
Spoon the mixture into individual serving cups or bowls.
Top each serving with a scoop of ice cream.
Sprinkle toasted pinipig over the top of each serving.
You can customize your halo halo with your favorite fruits and toppings.
Experiment with different flavors of ice cream to find your favorite combination.
